scripts.sync:cosmetics: node scripts/discover-cosmetics.js && node scripts/normalize-cosmetics.js && node scripts/sync-cosmetic-assets.js && node scripts/audit-cosmetics.js
scripts.check:data: node scripts/normalize-images.js --check && node scripts/build-data.js --check && node scripts/audit-cosmetics.js && node scripts/verify-teachables.js && node scripts/verify-perk-descriptions.js
scripts.verify:content: node scripts/normalize-images.js --check && node scripts/audit-cosmetics.js && node scripts/verify-teachables.js && node scripts/verify-perk-descriptions.js
scripts.android:build: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
